prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke **SSC 7.0L V8 (engine code: SSC-Tuatara-V8-7.0L)** twin-turbo system with **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbos (106mm compressor wheels, 1.28 A/R turbine housings) and **Tial MV-R 60mm** wastegates for 2.5 bar (36 psi) peak boost, paired with a **Pectel SQ6M** standalone ECU running custom 4D ignition and fuel maps for 1,800+ hp on E85

Install **SSC billet aluminum connecting rods** (H-beam, 4340 chromoly, 6.125" length) with **Carrillo DLC-coated wrist pins** and **JE 9.5:1 forged pistons** (2618-T6 alloy, 4.125" bore) to handle 9,500 RPM redline and 1,500 ft-lbs torque

Replace the OEM **SSC carbon-fiber driveshaft** with a **The Driveshaft Shop 3.5" 4340 chromoly one-piece unit** and **RICHMOND 6-speed sequential transaxle** (dog-ring, straight-cut gears, 2.64:1 final drive) with **PPG 8-piston carbon-ceramic brakes** (420mm rotors, AP Racing calipers) for 2.8s 0-60 mph
estetica: Fit a **SSC Tuatara-specific Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (pre-preg carbon fiber, 3-piece overfenders, 50mm wider rear track) with **Vorsteiner V-FF 102** forged wheels (20x12.5" front, 21x15" rear, -30mm offset, 5x150 PCD) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (285/30R20 front, 355/25R21 rear)

Install a **SSC Tuatara active aero package** featuring **Gurney flaps** (3D-printed titanium, 25mm chord) on the **SSC carbon-fiber rear wing** (adjustable 0-25° AoA) and **underbody diffusers** (3-stage, 1.2m² total area) with **Vortex generators** (laser-cut aluminum, 15mm height) for 2,200 lbs downforce at 250 mph

Apply **SSC Tuatara-exclusive PPF (Paint Protection Film)** in **XPEL Stealth matte finish** with **3M Scotchprint Wrap 2080 Series** custom graphics (carbon fiber weave, metallic gold accents) and **Oracle Lighting RGB+W underglow kit** (120 LED/m, 16.8M colors, IP68-rated)
